method: surface profilometry reported in the source paper
operating_conditions: Approximately 2 mm circular GaN/III-N membrane; initial bow was reported as approximately 10 um and bow increased by approximately 17 um after CVD diamond growth.
review_notes: The stored quantity is the reported increase, not a derived final-bow value.

uncertainty.basis: Use the paper-reported largest profilometry standard deviation of 2 um as a conservative literature-level note.
